notes: Each entry has: code (Pokemon TCG API code where known), game, series, name_en (canonical), name_it (best-effort; falls back to name_en for untranslated modern sets), release_date (ISO), total_cards (null when unknown), aliases (alternative names users might type).

Italian names follow Pokemon Italia official translations where available. For sets that were never officially translated (e.g., most XY/SM/SWSH special sets), name_it equals name_en — the fuzzy matcher in expansion_match.py handles partial matches in either language.
Codes prefixed with `me*` for Mega Evolution era are local slugs; once official TCG API codes are published, update them here.

expansions.name_en: EX Team Magma vs Team Aqua
expansions.name_it: EX Team Magma vs Team Aqua
aliases: ex team magma vs team aqua

expansions.name_it: EX Rosso Fuoco e Verde Foglia
EX Il Ritorno del Team Rocket
